data.biography:
Byun Yo-han (born April 29, 1986) is a South Korean actor celebrated for his depth, expressive eyes, and mastery across film, television, and even musical theater. Unlike many stars who debut in mainstream projects, he meticulously built his career on the foundation of the independent film scene.

Byun Yo-han is an alumnus of the prestigious Korea National University of Arts (KNUA), a training ground for many of Korea’s top actors. During his student years, he dedicated himself to the craft, appearing in over 30 short and independent films starting in 2011. This period gave him the experience to tackle nuanced, unconventional roles early in his career, such as his lead performance in the independent hit film Socialphobia (2015).

His professional breakthrough came in 2014 with the cable television series, Misaeng: Incomplete Life. Playing Han Seok-yool, the overly talkative, slightly eccentric, but ultimately deeply empathetic intern with long, messy hair, Byun captured the imagination of the public. He won the Best New Actor award at the APAN Star Awards, launching him from an unknown indie darling into a recognized television star.

Following Misaeng, Byun quickly cemented his status as a talented lead actor in historical dramas, a genre that demands powerful presence and technical skill.

Six Flying Dragons (2015–2016): He took on the epic role of Ddang-sae / Lee Bang-ji, a tragic figure who becomes the legendary master swordsman. The demanding physical and emotional scope of the 50-episode sageuk earned him critical praise and an Excellence Award at the SBS Drama Awards.

Mr. Sunshine (2018): In one of the highest-rated dramas in cable history, Byun starred as Kim Hee-sung, the wealthy, sensitive fiancé to the female lead. His portrayal of a man trapped by his family's dark history and the era's changing politics showcased a lighter, yet profoundly melancholic, side to his acting.

While maintaining a strong television presence, Byun Yo-han consistently returned to film to challenge himself with diverse characters.

In 2021, he starred in the black-and-white historical drama The Book of Fish, delivering a standout performance as Chang-dae, a zealous Confucian scholar. This role earned him multiple nominations for Best Actor.

His film career reached a new peak with the 2022 naval blockbuster, Hansan: Rising Dragon, where he played the pivotal antagonist, Wakizaka Yasuharu, a cunning Japanese commander and rival to Admiral Yi Sun-sin. Byun's portrayal was widely praised for its intensity, leading him to win the Best Supporting Actor prize at prestigious ceremonies including the Baeksang Arts Awards, Blue Dragon Film Awards, and Grand Bell Awards.

Most recently, Byun Yo-han has starred in the Disney+ political drama Uncle Samsik (2024) and the dark thriller series Black Out (2024), continuing to demonstrate his preference for complex, character-driven narratives.

Byun Yo-han’s career is defined by his versatility and his deep commitment to the emotional truth of every role, making him one of South Korea's most trusted and acclaimed contemporary actors.
data.name: Byun Yo-han

"Loverly" soprano Marni Nixon has ensured herself a proper place in film history although most moviegoers would not recognize her if they passed her on the street. But if you heard her, that might be a horse of a different color. Marni is one of those unsung heroes (or should I say "much sung" heroes) whose incredible talents were given short shrift at the time. For those who think film superstars such as Deborah Kerr, Natalie Wood, and Audrey Hepburn possessed not only powerhouse dramatic talents but amazing singing voices as well...think again. Kerr's Anna in The King and I (1956), Natalie's Maria in West Side Story (1961), and Audrey's Eliza in My Fair Lady (1964) were all dubbed by the amazing Marni Nixon, and nowhere in the credits will you find that fact. Born Marni McEathron in Altadena, California, she was a former child actress and soloist with the Roger Wagner Chorale in the beginning. Trained in opera, yet possessing a versatile voice for pop music and easy standards as well, she not only sang for Arnold Schönberg and Igor Stravinsky but also recorded light songs. Marni made her Broadway musical debut in 1954 in a show that lasted two months but nothing came from it. In 1955, the singer contracted to dub Deborah Kerr in The King and I (1956) was killed in a car accident in Europe and a replacement was needed. Marni was hired...and the rest is history. Much impressed, the studios brought her in to "ghost" Ms. Kerr's voice once again in the classic tearjerker An Affair to Remember (1957). From there she went on to make Natalie Wood and Audrey Hepburn sound incredibly good with such classic songs as "Tonight" and "Wouldn't It Be Loverly."

She finally appeared on screen in a musical in The Sound of Music (1965) starring Julie Andrews, who physically resembles Marni. The role is a small one, however, and she is only given a couple of solo lines in "How Do You Solve a Problem Like Maria?" as a singing nun. Marni's vocal career in films dissolved by the mid 1960s, but she continued on with concerts and in symphony halls, while billing herself as "The Voice of Hollywood" in one-woman cabaret shows. Throughout the years, she has played on the legit stage, including the lead roles in "The King and I" and "The Sound of Music," and in her matronly years has been seen as Fraulein Schneider in "Cabaret," and in the musicals "Follies" and "70 Girls 70." Her last filmed singing voice was as the grandmother in the animated feature Mulan (1998) in the 1990s. Married three times, twice to musicians; one of her husbands, Ernest Gold, by whom she had three children, was a film composer and is best known for his Academy Award-winning epic Exodus (1960).

Marni Nixon died  July 24, 2016 (age 86), in New York City, New York, USA
data.name: Marni Nixon

data.biography: Margaret Nixon McEathron (Altadena, California, 22 de febrer de 1930 - New York, 24 de juliol de 2016), més coneguda com a Marni Nixon, (Altadena, 22 de febrer de 1930 - Nova York, 24 de juliol de 2016) va ser una soprano estatunidenca i cantant dobladora no acreditada d'actrius destacades en musicals de pel·lícules. A més del seu treball de veu en pel·lícules, la carrera de Nixon va incloure actuacions pròpies en cinema, televisió, òpera i musicals a Broadway i en altres llocs dels Estats Units, actuacions en concerts amb les principals orquestres simfòniques i enregistraments.

Michael Corbett Shannon (born August 7, 1974) is an American actor, producer, musician, and theatre director. He has been nominated twice for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for his roles in the Sam Mendes period drama Revolutionary Road (2008) and the Tom Ford psychological thriller Nocturnal Animals (2016). He earned Screen Actors Guild Award and Golden Globe Award nominations for his role in 99 Homes (2014), and a Tony Award nomination for Best Featured Actor in a Play for the Broadway revival of Eugene O'Neill's Long Day's Journey into Night (2016).

Shannon made his film debut in 1993 with Groundhog Day and received widespread attention for his performance in 8 Mile (2002). He is known for his on-screen versatility, performing in both comedies and dramas such as Pearl Harbor (2001), Bad Boys II (2003), Bug (2006), Before the Devil Knows You're Dead (2007), Bad Lieutenant: Port of Call New Orleans (2009), The Iceman (2012), Premium Rush (2012), The Night Before (2015), The Shape of Water (2017) and Knives Out (2019). He played Superman's Kryptonian adversary General Zod in Man of Steel (2013) and Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice (2016), and is set to reprise the role in The Flash (2022). Shannon is a frequent collaborator of Jeff Nichols, appearing in all of his films: Shotgun Stories (2007), Take Shelter (2011), Mud (2012), Midnight Special, and Loving (both 2016). He is also known for his role as Nelson Van Alden in the HBO period drama series Boardwalk Empire (2010–2014), for which he was nominated for three Screen Actors Guild Awards. In 2021, he had a main role in the Hulu drama miniseries Nine Perfect Strangers.

data.biography: Michael Corbett Shannon (Lexington, Kentucky, 7 de agosto de 1974) é um ator, produtor, diretor e músico americano. Ele foi indicado ao Oscar de Melhor Ator Coadjuvante por Revolutionary Road e por Animais Noturnos. Seu papel em Revolutionary Road, atuando junto com Leonardo DiCaprio e Kate Winslet, foi muito elogiado. Com esse trabalho ele foi indicado ao Oscar de Ator Coadjuvante. Ele interpretou o papel de Doutor Cross Williams na adaptação de Jonah Hex. Atualmente ele atua como regular na aclamada série de televisão da HBO Boardwalk Empire, como o Detetive Nelson Van Alden.

Michael Corbett Shannon (né le 7 août 1974) est un acteur et musicien américain. Il a fait ses débuts au cinéma aux côtés de Bill Murray dans Groundhog Day (1993) et a reçu beaucoup d'attention pour sa performance dans 8 Mile (2002), où il dépeint le petit ami de la mère du personnage d'Eminem (Kim Basinger). Shannon est connu pour sa polyvalence à l'écran, jouant dans des comédies et des drames. Parmi les projets notables, citons Pearl Harbor (2001), Bad Boys II (2003), Bug (2006), Before the Devil Knows You're Dead (2007), The Iceman (2012), Man of Steel (2013) et Elvis & Nixon (2016). Il est un collaborateur fréquent de Jeff Nichols, apparaissant dans tous ses films : Shotgun Stories (2007), Take Shelter (2011), Mud (2012), Midnight Special et Loving (2016). Il est également connu pour son rôle de Nelson Van Alden/George Mueller dans la série dramatique Boardwalk Empire (2010-2014).

Shannon a été nominée deux fois pour le Academy Award du meilleur acteur de soutien, d'abord pour Revolutionary Road (2008) et de nouveau pour Nocturnal Animals (2016). 99 Homes (2014) lui a également valu des nominations pour un Screen Actors Guild Award et le Golden Globe Award pour le meilleur acteur de soutien - Cinéma.

Michael Corbett Shannon nació y se crió en Lexington, Kentucky, hijo de Geraldine Hine, abogada, y Donald Sutherlin Shannon, profesor de contabilidad en la Universidad DePaul. Su abuelo fue el entomólogo Raymond Corbett Shannon.

Shannon comenzó su carrera profesional en Chicago. Su primer papel como actor fue en «Winterset» en el Centro de Teatro de Illinois. Durante los siguientes años, continuó trabajando en el escenario con compañías como Steppenwolf, The Next Lab y Red Orchid Theatre. Posteriormente se mudó a Londres por un año y actuó en el escenario del West End de Londres en producciones como «Woyzeck», «Killer Joe» y «Bug».

Mientras estaba en Chicago, Shannon también se mantuvo ocupada frente a las cámaras de cine y televisión, sobre todo en el proyecto de pantalla grande Chicago Cab (1997), basado en la larga obra de teatro «Hellcab». Canguro Jack, trinca y brinca (2003) marcó la tercera producción de Jerry Bruckheimer en la que Shannon ha aparecido. También apareció en Dos policías rebeldes II (2003), dirigida por Michael Bay y protagonizada por Will Smith y Martin Lawrence, y en Ayúdame con el muerto (2003), con Johnny Knoxville y Christina Applegate.

Además, Shannon apareció en Pearl Harbor (2001), también dirigida por Bay. Sus otros créditos cinematográficos también incluyen 8 millas (2002) de Curtis Hanson; Cameron Crowe's Vanilla Sky (2001) con Tom Cruise; Toda la verdad de Carl Franklin (2002) con Morgan Freeman; Cecil B. Demente (2000) de John Waters, y Tigerland (2000), el drama de guerra de Joel Schumacher.

Michael Shannon (* 7. August 1974 in Lexington, Kentucky) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Nach Rollen in Und täglich grüßt das Murmeltier (1993) und Außer Kontrolle (1996) bekam er 1998 einen größeren Part in Chicago Cab. 2000 war Shannon in Joel Schumachers Kriegsdrama Tigerland zu sehen. 2003 spielte er an der Seite von Martin Lawrence, Will Smith und Jordi Mollà in Bad Boys II. Ein Jahr zuvor spielte er neben Rap-Star Eminem in 8 Mile. 2007 ist Michael Shannon neben Eric Bana und Drew Barrymore in Glück im Spiel zu sehen. Nach Arbeiten mit den Regisseuren William Friedkin, Oliver Stone und Sidney Lumet übernahm er 2007 in dem Independentfilm Shotgun Stories die Hauptrolle. Seinen Durchbruch hatte er mit der Nebenrolle des John Givings in Sam Mendes’ Drama Zeiten des Aufruhrs (2008) an der Seite von Kate Winslet und Leonardo DiCaprio. Der Part des wahrheitsliebenden Patienten einer Nervenheilanstalt brachte ihm seine erste Oscar-Nominierung ein.

2009 war er in zwei Spielfilmen, Bad Lieutenant – Cop ohne Gewissen und Ein fürsorglicher Sohn, des deutschen Regisseurs Werner Herzog zu sehen. Bei der im Juni 2013 erschienenen Superman-Comicverfilmung Man of Steel übernahm er die Rolle des Schurken General Zod.

Shannon arbeitete wiederholt mit Regisseur Jeff Nichols zusammen, in dessen Filmen Shotgun Stories (2007), Take Shelter – Ein Sturm zieht auf (2011), Mud (2012), Midnight Special und Loving (beide 2016) er jeweils eine Rolle übernahm. In letzterem stellte er den LIFE-Fotografen Grey Villet dar.

Майкл Шеннон — американський актор, номінант на премію «Оскар» у категорії «Найкращий актор другого плану» за фільм «Дорога змін».

Почав кар’єру як театральний актор у місті Чикаґо, потім почав грати невеликі ролі в різноманітних фільмах. У 2006 році зіграв головну роль у фільмі «Глюки», а 2008 року був номінований на премію «Оскар».

data.biography:
Michael Corbett Shannon, 7 Ağustos 1974 tarihinde Lexington, Kentucky'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Akademisyen bir ailenin çocuğu olan Shannon, çocukluğunu Kentucky ve Chicago arasında geçirdi. Oyunculuk kariyerine, Amerika'nın en prestijli tiyatro topluluklarına ev sahipliği yapan Chicago'da başladı. Steppenwolf ve A Red Orchid Theatre gibi topluluklarda sahneye çıkarak yeteneğini geliştirdi ve tiyatro dünyasında kendine sağlam bir yer edindi. Sinemaya geçişi, "Groundhog Day" (1993) gibi filmlerdeki küçük ama unutulmaz rollerle oldu ve "Pearl Harbor" (2001), "8 Mile" (2002) gibi yapımlarda karakter oyuncusu olarak dikkat çekti.

Shannon'ın kariyerinde bir dönüm noktası olan ve ona uluslararası alanda tanınırlık getiren rol, Sam Mendes'in yönettiği "Hayallerin Peşinde" (Revolutionary Road) (2008) filmindeki performansı oldu. Bu rolüyle En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında Akademi Ödülü'ne (Oscar) aday gösterildi ve Hollywood'un en yetenekli aktörlerinden biri olarak kabul edildi. Bu dönemde yönetmen Jeff Nichols ile verimli bir iş birliği başlattı. "Shotgun Stories" (2007), "Sığınak" (Take Shelter) (2011), "Mud" (2012) ve "Midnight Special" (2016) gibi filmlerdeki başrolleriyle eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı. Özellikle "Sığınak" filmindeki performansı, modern sinemanın en güçlü performanslarından biri olarak kabul edilir.

2010'lu yıllarda Shannon, hem bağımsız sinemadaki başarısını hem de büyük bütçeli yapımlardaki varlığını pekiştirdi. HBO'nun efsanevi dizisi "Boardwalk Empire"da (2010-2014) canlandırdığı federal ajan Nelson Van Alden karakteriyle geniş kitlelerin beğenisini kazandı. 2013 yılında Zack Snyder'ın yönettiği "Man of Steel" filminde General Zod karakterini canlandırarak küresel bir izleyici kitlesine ulaştı ve bu rolü 2023 yapımı "The Flash" filminde yeniden üstlendi. 2016 yılında Tom Ford'un yönettiği "Gece Hayvanları" (Nocturnal Animals) filmindeki dedektif rolüyle ikinci kez Oscar'a aday gösterildi.

Shannon, kariyeri boyunca canlandırdığı yoğun, karmaşık ve çoğu zaman rahatsız edici karakterlerle tanınır. "Suyun Sesi" (The Shape of Water) (2017) ve "Bıçaklar Çekildi" (Knives Out) (2019) gibi ödüllü filmlerdeki rolleriyle çok yönlülüğünü kanıtlamıştır. Oyunculuğun yanı sıra, solistliğini ve şarkı yazarlığını yaptığı "Corporal" adında bir indie rock grubu da bulunmaktadır. Jeff Nichols'ın yönettiği "The Bikeriders" (2023) gibi son dönem filmleriyle, neslinin en saygın ve üretken aktörlerinden biri olmaya devam etmektedir.

ممثل ومنتج أمريكي، ولد في 7 أغسطس 1974 في ليكسينجتون، كنتاكي، الولايات المتحدة. بدأ مسيرته الفنية عام 1992 في (Overexposed). من أعماله (Revolutionary Road) و(Take Shelter) و(Midnight Special) و(The Shape of Water). اشتهر بشخصية جنرال زود في فيلم (Man of Steel).

data.biography:
Michael Corbett Shannon (nato il 7 agosto 1974) è un attore, produttore, musicista e regista teatrale statunitense. È stato nominato due volte per l'Oscar come miglior attore non protagonista per i suoi ruoli nel film drammatico di Sam Mendes Revolutionary Road (2008) e nel thriller psicologico di Tom Ford Nocturnal Animals (2016). Ha ottenuto nomination allo Screen Actors Guild Award e al Golden Globe Award per il suo ruolo in 99 Homes (2014), e una nomination al Tony Award come miglior attore protagonista in una commedia per il revival di Broadway di Long Day's Journey into Night (2016) di Eugene O'Neill.

Shannon ha fatto il suo debutto cinematografico nel 1993 con Ricomincio da capo e ha ricevuto grande attenzione per la sua interpretazione in 8 Mile (2002). È noto per la sua versatilità sullo schermo, recitando sia in commedie che in film drammatici come Pearl Harbor (2001), Bad Boys II (2003), Bug (2006), Prima che il diavolo sappia che sei morto (2007), Il cattivo tenente : Port of Call New Orleans (2009), The Iceman (2012), Premium Rush (2012), La notte prima (2015), La forma dell'acqua (2017) e Knives Out (2019). Ha interpretato l'avversario kryptoniano di Superman, il generale Zod, in Man of Steel (2013) e Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice (2016), ed è destinato a riprendere il ruolo in The Flash (2022). Shannon è una collaboratrice frequente di Jeff Nichols, apparendo in tutti i suoi film: Shotgun Stories (2007), Take Shelter (2011), Mud (2012), Midnight Special e Loving (entrambi del 2016). È anche noto per il ruolo di Nelson Van Alden nella serie drammatica della HBO Boardwalk Empire (2010–2014), per la quale è stato nominato per tre Screen Actors Guild Awards. Nel 2021, ha avuto un ruolo principale nella miniserie drammatica di Hulu Nine Perfect Strangers.

💥Майкл Корбет Шеннон. Родился в 1974-ом году в Лексингтоне, Кентукки, США. Рос в семье с младшей сестрой. Отец работал профессором, а мать преподавала юриспруденцию. Учился в средней школе Нью-Триер в Иллинойсе. Работает актёром, режиссёром и музыкантом. С 2018-го женат на актрисе Кейт Аррингтон, у пары 2-ое дочерей: Сильвия и Мэри

🏆Главные награды🏆: Гильдия киноактёров США (2023) [Дейзи Джонс и The Six], Сатурн (2015) [Человек из стали], Золотой глобус (2019) [Подпольная империя]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Человек из стали» (2013), «Форма воды» (2017), «Достать ножи» (2019), «Кенгуру Джекпот» (2003), «Дейзи Джонс и The Six» (2023)

迈克尔·科贝特·香农（Michael Corbett Shannon，1974 年 8 月 7 日出生）是美国演员、制片人、音乐家和戏剧导演。他曾两次获得奥斯卡最佳男配角奖提名，因为他在萨姆·门德斯的时代剧《革命之路》（2008 年）和汤姆·福特心理惊悚片《夜行动物》（2016 年）中的角色。他因在《99个家》（2014 年）中的角色获得了美国演员工会奖和金球奖提名，并因尤金·奥尼尔 （Eugene O'Neill） 的《漫长的一天》（2016 年）的百老汇复兴而获得托尼奖最佳剧情男主角提名。

香农于 1993 年凭借《土拨鼠之日》首次亮相电影，并因在 8 英里（2002 年）中的表演而受到广泛关注。他以银幕上的多才多艺而闻名，曾在喜剧和戏剧中演出，如《珍珠港》（2001 年）、《坏男孩 II》（2003 年）、《虫子》（2006 年）、《在魔鬼知道你死了之前》（2007 年）、《坏中尉：新奥尔良停靠港》（2009 年）、《冰人》（2012 年）、《高级冲刺》（2012 年）、《前夜》（2015 年）、《水形物语》（2017 年）和《利刃出鞘》（2019 年）。他在《钢铁之躯》（2013 年）和《蝙蝠侠大战超人：正义黎明》（2016 年）中扮演超人的氪星对手佐德将军，并将在《闪电侠》（2022 年）中重新扮演这个角色。香农是杰夫·尼科尔斯（Jeff Nichols）的经常合作者，出现在他的所有电影中：《霰弹枪故事》（2007年）、《避难所》（2011年）、《泥泞》（2012年）、《午夜特辑》和《爱》（均为2016年）。他还因在 HBO 时代剧集《浮桥帝国》（2010-2014 年）中饰演纳尔逊·范·奥尔登 （Nelson Van Alden） 而闻名，并因此获得了三项美国演员工会奖提名。2021年，他在Hulu电视剧迷你剧《九个完美陌生人》中担任主要角色。
data.name: 迈克尔·珊农

data.biography:
米高·高伯特·沙朗（英語：Michael Corbett Shannon，1974年8月7日—）是美國演員、製片人、音樂家和戲劇導演。他曾兩次獲得奧斯卡最佳男配角獎提名，因為他在森·文迪斯（Sam Mendes）的時代劇《浮生路》（Revolutionary Road）（2008 年）和湯·福特（Tom Ford）心理驚悚片《迷離字戀》（Nocturnal Animals）（2016 年）中的角色。他因在《鬥地主》（99 Homes）（2014 年）中的角色獲得了美國演員工會獎和金球獎提名，並因尤金·奧尼爾（Eugene O'Neill） 的《長夜漫漫路迢迢》（Long Day's Journey into Night）（2016 年）的百老匯重演而獲得東尼獎最佳劇情男主角提名。

沙朗於 1993 年憑藉《偷天情緣》（Groundhog Day）首次亮相電影，並因在《八里公路》（8 Mile）（2002 年）中的表演而受到廣泛關注。他以銀幕上的多才多藝而聞名，曾在喜劇和戲劇中演出，如《珍珠港》（Pearl Harbor）（2001 年）、	《重案夢幻組2》（Bad Boys II）（2003 年）、《賊兄弟連環劫》（Before the Devil Knows You're Dead）（2007 年）、《腐敗刑警》（Bad Lieutenant: Port of Call New Orleans）（2009 年）、《冷面梟雄》（The Iceman）（2012 年）、《亡命快遞》（Premium Rush）（2012 年）、《今晚High到盡》（The Night Before）（2015 年）、《忘形水》（The Shape of Water）（2017 年）和《神探白朗：福比利大宅謀殺案》（Knives Out）（2019 年）。他在《超人：鋼鐵英雄》（Man of Steel）（2013 年）和《蝙蝠俠對超人：正義曙光》（Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice）（2016 年）中扮演超人的氪星對手薩德將軍（General Zod），並在《閃電俠》（The Flash）（2022 年）中重新扮演這個角色。沙朗是謝夫·尼高斯（Jeff Nichols）的經常合作者，出現在他的所有電影中：《Shotgun Stories》（2007 年）、《末日驚防》（Take Shelter）（2011 年）、《爛泥》（Mud）（2012 年）、《異能劫》（Midnight Special）和《相愛很難》（Loving）（均為 2016 年）。他還因在 HBO 時代劇集《酒私風雲》（Boardwalk Empire）（2010 - 2014 年）中飾演 Nelson Van Alden / George Mueller  而聞名，並因此獲得了三項美國演員工會獎提名。2021 年，他在 Hulu 電視劇迷你劇《九位完美陌生人》（Nine Perfect Strangers）中擔任主要角色。
data.name: 米高·沙朗

data.biography:
Michael Corbett Shannon (geboren 7 augustus 1974) is een Amerikaanse acteur, producent, muzikant en theaterregisseur. Hij is tweemaal genomineerd voor een Academy Award voor Beste Bijrolacteur voor zijn rollen in het kostuumdrama Revolutionary Road (2008) van Sam Mendes en de psychologische thriller Nocturnal Animals (2016) van Tom Ford. Hij ontving nominaties voor een Screen Actors Guild Award en een Golden Globe Award voor zijn rol in 99 Homes (2014), en een Tony Award-nominatie voor Beste Bijrolacteur in een toneelstuk voor de Broadway-revival van Eugene O'Neills Long Day's Journey into Night (2016).

Shannon maakte zijn filmdebuut in 1993 met Groundhog Day en kreeg veel lof voor zijn rol in 8 Mile (2002). Hij staat bekend om zijn veelzijdigheid op het scherm en speelde in zowel komedies als drama's, zoals Pearl Harbor (2001), Bad Boys II (2003), Bug (2006), Before the Devil Knows You're Dead (2007), Bad Lieutenant: Port of Call New Orleans (2009), The Iceman (2012), Premium Rush (2012), The Night Before (2015), The Shape of Water (2017) en Knives Out (2019). Hij speelde Supermans Kryptonische tegenstander Generaal Zod in Man of Steel (2013) en Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice (2016), en zal deze rol opnieuw vertolken in The Flash (2022). Shannon werkt regelmatig samen met Jeff Nichols en is te zien in al zijn films: Shotgun Stories (2007), Take Shelter (2011), Mud (2012), Midnight Special en Loving (beide 2016). Hij is ook bekend van zijn rol als Nelson Van Alden in de HBO-serie Boardwalk Empire (2010-2014), waarvoor hij drie keer genomineerd werd voor een Screen Actors Guild Award. In 2021 speelde hij een hoofdrol in de Hulu-miniserie Nine Perfect Strangers.

Parminder Kaur Nagra (Leicester, 1975. október 5. –) amerikai–indiai színésznő.

Legismertebb szerepe Neela Rasgotra doktor a Vészhelyzetben. Legelső filmje a Csavard be, mint Beckham volt, ekkor figyeltek föl a tehetségére.

Parminder Kaur Nagra Leicesterben született Sukha Nashuter és Nagra pandzsábi bevándorló gyári munkások gyermekeként. Szülei az 1960-as években emigráltak Angliába, Parminder már ott nőtt fel. Két fiútestvére és egy lánytestvére van. Legjobb barátnője Maura Tierney, aki szintén játszik a Vészhelyzet című sorozatban. Parminder 2009. január 17-én hét évi jegyesség után, szikh rítus szerint összeházasodott James Stenson fotóssal, és már május 19-én megszületett gyermekük, Kai David Singh Stenson, de 2012 februárjában beadta a válókeresetet. 2013 májusában kimondták válásukat.

data.biography:
Shah Rukh Khan (born November 2, 1965), often referred to as SRK or the "King of Bollywood," is one of India's most iconic actors and producers. Born in Delhi, he began his career in television with shows like Fauji (1988) and Circus (1989). His film debut came in 1992 with Deewana, which marked the start of an illustrious career.

Shah Rukh Khan has appeared in over 80 films, earning widespread acclaim for his performances in movies such as Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge (1995), Kuch Kuch Hota Hai (1998), Chak De! India (2007), and My Name Is Khan (2010). He has won 14 Filmfare Awards, including eight for Best Actor, a record in Bollywood. In 2005, he was honored with the Padma Shri, India's fourth-highest civilian award, for his contributions to Indian cinema.

Beyond acting, SRK is a successful entrepreneur, co-owning the Kolkata Knight Riders cricket team and founding the production company Red Chillies Entertainment. He is also known for his philanthropic work, particularly in child health and education. Shah Rukh Khan is married to Gauri Khan, and they have three children.
data.name: Shah Rukh Khan

data.biography:
Shah Rukh Khan, von seinen Fans oft SRK abgekürzt, ist einer der erfolgreichsten indischen Schauspieler.

Seine erste Rolle hatte er in der Fernsehserie Fauji, danach spielte er eine kleine Rolle in der Serie Circus (1989). Im selben Jahr spielte er seine erste Filmrolle in dem Fernsehfilm In Which Annie Gives It Those Ones. Sein Bollywood-Debüt gab er mit dem Film Deewana (1992). Nachdem er anfänglich den Liebhaber gespielt hatte, wurde er in Schurkenrollen besetzt. Der Wechsel vom Bösewicht zurück zum Helden ist in Bollywood eher ungewöhnlich und macht SRK zu einer Ausnahmeerscheinung.
data.name: Shah Rukh Khan

data.biography: 对于大部分印度人来说，沙鲁克·汗如同一个“印度梦”。他双亲早逝，出身平凡，凭借自身努力成为了宝莱坞近20年来最具影响和代表性的人物。1992年进入电影圈，第二年，1993年开始拿最佳男演员奖，此后凭着努力敬业的态度，出色的演技获奖无数，成为印度头号男影星。本世纪初，《阿育王》和《宝莱坞生死恋》成就了他的国际巨星身份，曾被《时代》评为“影响亚洲的人”。他每次去英国出席颁奖典礼都如同一场风暴来袭，2004年前往芝加哥取外景时曾造成万人围观交通堵塞，2008年被《商业周刊》世界最具影响力50位人物排名41位（唯一入围影星）。
data.name: 沙鲁克·汗

data.biography:
Shah Rukh Khan (nacido el 2 de noviembre de 1965) es un destacado actor y productor de Bollywood. Hizo su debut cinematográfico en Deewana (1992). En 2005, el gobierno de la India lo honró con el Padma Shri por sus contribuciones al cine indio.

En 2003, fundó la productora cinematográfica Red Chillies Entertainment junto con su esposa Gauri Khan.

Shahrukh Khan (hindi : शाहरुख़ ख़ान, ourdou : شاہ روخ خان), parfois orthographié Shah Rukh Khan et familièrement appelé SRK, est un acteur et producteur indien, occasionnellement showman et présentateur de jeu télévisé, né le 2 novembre 1965 à Delhi. Il est considéré comme l’un des acteurs les plus influents au monde avec des millions de fans présent sur les 5 continents, ce qui fait de lui l’une des plus grandes vedettes du cinéma indien au niveau mondial. Il reste parmi les personnalités les plus fortes d’Asie.

data.biography:
Jerome Patrick Flynn is an English actor and singer. He is best known for his roles as Bronn on the hit HBO series Game of Thrones, Paddy Garvey of the King's Fusiliers on the ITV series Soldier Soldier, Fireman Kenny 'Rambo' Baines on the pilot of London's Burning, and Bennet Drake on Ripper Street.

He and his Soldier Soldier co-star Robson Green also performed as Robson & Jerome in the later half of the 1990s. They released a version of "Unchained Melody", which stayed at number 1 for 7 weeks on the UK Chart, selling more than a million copies and becoming the best-selling single of 1995. The duo had two further number 1 singles: "I Believe" and "What Becomes of the Brokenhearted". Their eponymous debut album and the follow-up Take Two both reached number 1 on the UK Albums Chart.
data.name: Jerome Flynn

data.biography:
Jerome Patrick Flynn (16 de marzo de 1963) es un actor y cantante inglés. Más conocido por sus papeles en las series Soldier Soldier y Ripper Street, alcanzó mucha popularidad interpretando a Bronn en la serie de la HBO Game of Thrones.​ También interpretó a "Hector" en el capítulo llamado "Shut Up and Dance (Black Mirror) de la serie original de Netflix Black Mirror.

Viniendo de una familia de actores (su padre Eric Flynn fue un actor y cantante, mientras que su hermano mayor Daniel Flynn también es actor), Flynn hizo su debut en pantalla en la serie American Playhouse en 1985. Poco a poco, consiguió más papeles como invitado antes de interpretar a Freddie en la serie, The Fear (1988). En 2010, fue confirmado para el papel de Bronn en la serie de la HBO, Game of Thrones, basada en la serie de libros Canción de hielo y fuego escrita por George R.R. Martin.

Jerome Patrick Flynn (* 16. März 1963 in Bromley, Kent) ist ein britischer Schauspieler und Musiker.

Er begann seine Karriere in Soldier Soldier (1991). Mit seinem Filmpartner Robson Green in Soldier Soldier sang er den Song Unchained Melody, der auch in diesem Film vorkam. Der Soundtrack zum Film, auf dem auch Unchained Melody enthalten war, verkaufte sich in Großbritannien mehr als 1,9 Millionen Mal.

2007 führte er bei dem Low-Budget-Streifen Rude Tales Regie und spielte darin gleichzeitig auch die Hauptrolle selben Vornamens. Von 2011 bis 2019 spielte Flynn zudem in der HBO-Fantasyserie Game of Thrones fortlaufend die Rolle des Söldners Bronn. Von 2012 bis 2016 stand Flynn zusammen mit Matthew Macfadyen für die BBC-Serie Ripper Street vor der Kamera.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Jerome Patrick Flynn jest angielskim aktorem i piosenkarzem. Najbardziej znany jest z ról Bronna w przebojowym serialu HBO Gra o tron, Paddy'ego Garveya z King's Fusiliers w serialu ITV Soldier Soldier, strażaka Kenny'ego „Rambo” Bainesa w pilocie londyńskiego Burning i Benneta Drake'a w Ripper Street.

On i jego kolega z Soldier Soldier Robson Green występowali również jako Robson & Jerome w drugiej połowie lat 90. Wydali wersję „Unchained Melody”, która utrzymywała się na 1. miejscu przez 7 tygodni na brytyjskiej liście przebojów, sprzedając się w ponad milionie egzemplarzy i stając się najlepiej sprzedającym się singlem 1995 roku. Duet miał dwa kolejne single numer 1: „I Believe” i „What Becomes of the Brokenhearted”. Ich debiutancki album o tym samym tytule i jego kontynuacja Take Two osiągnęły numer 1 na brytyjskiej liście przebojów.

Джером Патрик Флинн е роден на 16 март 1963 г. в Бромли, Кент, Англия. Той е английски актьор и певец, известен с ролите си на наемника Бронн в сериала "Игра на тронове", Бенет Дрейк в "Улица потрошителя" и капрал Пади Гарви в сериала "Солдат, войник". Флинн е син на актьора и певец Ерик Флин и преподавателката по драма Ферн Флин.  Джером Флинн започва актьорската си кариера в началото на 80-те години. Първата му значителна роля е в сериала "Солдат, войник" през 1991 г., където играе капрал Пади Гарви. През 1995 г. заедно със своя колега от сериала Робсън Грийн формират музикалния дует Robson & Jerome който постига голям успех с песента "Unchained Melody". Флинн се завръща на телевизионния екран с ролята на Бенет Дрейк в сериала "Улица потрошителя" през 2012 г. Най-известната му роля е тази на Бронн в сериала "Игра на тронове", която изпълнява от 2011 до 2019 г.  Флинн е участвал и в редица други продукции, включително пилотния епизод на "Лондон гори", където играе Kenny "Rambo" Baines. Той е номиниран за награда на Гилдията на филмовите актьори за ролята си в "Игра на тронове".  Освен актьорските си изяви, Флин е и активист за правата на животните. Вегетарианец е от 18-годишна възраст и е патрон на Вегетарианското общество.
data.name: Джером Флин

data.biography:
Jerome Patrick Flynn, 16 Mart 1963 tarihinde Bromley, Kent, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Aktör ve şarkıcı Eric Flynn ile drama öğretmeni Fern Flynn'in oğlu olarak sanatla iç içe bir ailede büyüyen Flynn, eğitimini Royal Central School of Speech and Drama'da tamamladı. Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında "A Summer Story" (1988) ve "To Kill a Priest" (1988) gibi filmlerde rol alsa da, İngiltere'de asıl tanınırlığını televizyon dünyasında kazandı. Özellikle ITV'nin uzun soluklu dizisi "London's Burning"de (1988) canlandırdığı itfaiyeci Kenny "Rambo" Baskin karakteriyle ilk büyük çıkışını yaptı.

1990'larda rol aldığı askeri drama dizisi "Soldier Soldier", Flynn'in kariyerinde ilginç ve beklenmedik bir dönüm noktası oldu. Dizideki rol arkadaşı Robson Green ile "Unchained Melody" şarkısını seslendirmeleri, yapımcı Simon Cowell'ın dikkatini çekti ve ikili "Robson & Jerome" adıyla bir pop müzik grubuna dönüştü. Çıkardıkları albümler ve cover şarkılar İngiltere müzik listelerinde zirveye oturdu ve milyonlarca sattı. Ancak bu yoğun ve ani şöhretin ardından Flynn, oyunculuk kariyerine ve müzik dünyasına uzun bir ara vererek manevi bir yolculuğa çıkmayı, Galler'de gözlerden uzak bir yaşam sürmeyi tercih etti.

Jerome Flynn'i küresel bir şöhrete kavuşturan ve yeni nesil izleyicilerle tanıştıran muazzam geri dönüşü, HBO'nun fenomen dizisi "Game of Thrones"ta (2011-2019) canlandırdığı paralı asker Bronn rolüyle gerçekleşti. Tyrion ve Jaime Lannister ile kurduğu dinamik, karakterin pragmatik zekası, kara mizahı ve usta dövüş yetenekleriyle birleşince, Bronn dizinin en akılda kalan ve sevilen karakterlerinden biri haline geldi. Sekiz sezon süren bu macera, ona dünya çapında sadık bir hayran kitlesi kazandırdı.

"Game of Thrones" devam ederken Flynn, BBC'nin eleştirmenlerce beğenilen dönem dizisi "Ripper Street"te (2012-2016) sert ve sadık Dedektif Çavuş Bennet Drake rolüyle dramatik oyunculuğunu bir kez daha kanıtladı. Bu performansı, ona En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında BAFTA TV Ödülü adaylığı getirdi. Ayrıca kült antoloji dizisi "Black Mirror"ın en gerilimli bölümlerinden biri olan "Shut Up and Dance"ta (2016) sergilediği performansla övgü topladı. Sinemada ise, dünyanın ilk tamamı yağlı boya ile yapılan animasyon filmi "Loving Vincent"ta (2017) Dr. Gachet'ye sesi ve görüntüsüyle hayat verdi. Aksiyon sinemasında da yer alarak "John Wick: Chapter 3 – Parabellum" (2019) filminde Berrada karakterini canlandırdı. Yakın dönemde ise "Yellowstone" evreninin bir parçası olan "1923" (2022) dizisinde acımasız İskoç çoban Banner Creighton rolüyle ekranlara gelerek kötü adam rollerindeki başarısını perçinledi.

Sanat hayatının yanı sıra, gençliğinden beri vejetaryen olan Flynn, sıkı bir hayvan hakları savunucusudur ve PETA gibi çeşitli çevre örgütleriyle aktif olarak çalışmaktadır.

data.biography: 中村狮童，日本男演员，出身日本歌舞伎世家，父亲及叔父都是歌舞伎演员，他自幼接受日本传统戏剧训练，一九八一年时已开始参与歌舞伎的演出，近年转战电影界。2002年主演电影《乒乓》，同年开始拍剧，正式踏足电影及电视界。中村在日本属于性格演员，每次演出都甚为抢镜，电影《乒乓》的演出，他终于跳出传统歌舞伎仃的框框，以光头造型配上没有眉毛的造型，极为突出！《乒乓》令他获得日本奥斯卡最佳新人赏。在《借着雨点说爱你》中，中村饰演不善于表达爱意的父亲，电影在日票房报捷，奠定了中村狮童实力演员之地位。
data.name: 中村狮童

Kenneth Todd Freeman (born July 9, 1965) is an American actor. He has been nominated for two Tony Awards over the course of his career and has won one Drama Desk Award. He has played supporting roles in films such as Grosse Pointe Blank (1997) and The Cider House Rules (1999), played a prominent recurring role on Buffy the Vampire Slayer (1998–1999), and was a series regular on A Series of Unfortunate Events (2017–2019).

Born in Houston, Texas, Freeman went to the local High School for the Performing and Visual Arts before later graduating from the University of North Carolina School of the Arts in 1987.

Freeman has been an ensemble member of the Steppenwolf Theatre Company in Chicago, Illinois since 1993. In the same year, he was nominated for the Tony Award for Best Actor in a Play for his lead performance in the Apartheid drama The Song of Jacob Zulu. More recently, Freeman has played the role of Doctor Dillamond from Wicked in the first North American tour, Chicago and Broadway productions. In 2015, he was nominated for his second Tony Award, this time for Best Featured Actor in a Play as Sissy Na Na in Airline Highway. He won the Drama Desk Award for Outstanding Featured Actor in a Play for the same role.

He has also had supporting roles in various films such as Eraser (1996), Grosse Pointe Blank (1997), The Cider House Rules (1999), and The Dark Knight (2008). On television, he earned a recurring role on Buffy the Vampire Slayer as Mr. Trick.

He performed in the Steppenwolf Theatre Company's production of Downstate, which concluded its run on November 18, 2018.

He portrayed Mr. Poe in the 2017 Netflix comedy drama series A Series of Unfortunate Events.
data.name: K. Todd Freeman

data.biography: Hiroshi Tamaki (玉木 宏 Tamaki Hiroshi, born 14 January 1980) is a Japanese actor, singer, and model from Nagoya, Japan. data.biography: Chin Han (秦漢; born 24 April 1946), is a Taiwanese actor whose birth name is Sun Siang-chong (孫祥鐘), and got his first stage name Kang Kai (康凱) from Li Han-Hsiang (李翰祥) at the beginning of his acting career. He changed his stage name to Sun Ge (孫戈) during the shooting of Five Brothers from Tangshan (唐山五兄弟; 1972). It was director Yao Feng-Pan (姚鳳磐) who gave him the stage name Chin Han, which he kept ever since. In Chin’s long acting career, he is best known for starring in literary romantic (愛情文藝) films and TV series, adaptations from novels by Qiong Yao (瓊瑤) and other writers in the 1970s and 1980s. With Charlie Chin(秦祥林), Brigitte Lin and Joan Lin (林鳳嬌), the four eventually became known as the "Two Chins, Two Lins" (二秦二林) for their extensive roles in the genre of literary romantic film.
data.name: Ronald Chin Han

data.biography: Paul Anthony Sorvino (April 13, 1939 – July 25, 2022) was a European-American businessman, entrepreneur, actor, opera singer, writer, and sculptor. He often portrayed authority figures on both sides of the law and was known for his roles as Paulie Cicero (based on Paul Vario) in the 1990 gangster film Goodfellas, and NYPD Sergeant Phil Cerreta on the TV series Law & Order. He took on supporting roles in A Touch of Class, Reds, The Rocketeer, Nixon, and Romeo + Juliet. He was the father of actors Mira Sorvino and Michael Sorvino.
data.name: Paul Sorvino

data.biography:
Paul Anthony Sorvino (* 13. April 1939 New York City) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler italienischer Abstammung.  Seine erste Filmrolle spielte er 1970 im Film Wo is' Papa?. Im Jahr 1973 wurde er für seine Rolle im Theaterstück That Championship Season für den Tony Award nominiert. Im Jahr 1976 erhielt Sorvino neben Karl Malden und Michael Douglas die führende Nebenrolle in der Folge Superstar der Serie Die Straßen von San Francisco, in der er den aufbrausenden New Yorker Polizei-Sergeant Bert D’Angelo spielte, der die Spur eines Verbrechers bis nach San Francisco verfolgt hatte. Das im folgenden Jahr ausgestrahlte Spin-off Superstar war jedoch ein Flop und wurde nach nur einer Staffel wieder eingestellt.

Sorvino spielte im Film Cruising (1980) neben Al Pacino und Karen Allen. Im Jahr 1990 übernahm er eine seiner bekanntesten Rollen, die des hochrangigen Mafiamitgliedes Paul Cicero (basierend auf Paul Vario) in Martin Scorseses Filmklassiker Good Fellas – Drei Jahrzehnte in der Mafia. Nach dieser Rolle wurde Sorvino später immer wieder als Mafiagangster eingesetzt, so in Rocketeer, Die Firma oder Bulletproof Gangster. Weitere wichtige Rollen übernahm er im Film Nixon (1995) neben Anthony Hopkins und im Film American Perfect (1997) neben Amanda Plummer. Er trat ebenfalls in einigen Fernsehserien wie We'll Get By, Bert D'Angelo/Superstar und Law & Order auf.

Paul Sorvino est un acteur et réalisateur américain né le 13 avril 1939 à New York (États-Unis) et décédé le 25 juillet 2022.  Il est en particulier connu pour son rôle de Paul Cicero dans le film Les Affranchis de Martin Scorsese.

Paul Anthony Sorvino (Brooklyn, Nova York, 13 d'abril de 1939 - Jacksonville, Florida, 25 de juliol de 2022) fou un actor estatunidenc. És sobretot conegut pel seu paper de Paulie Cicero en la pel·lícula de gàngsters "Goodfellas" (un dels nostres) de 1990 i també pel paper del sergent Phil Cerreta en la segona temporada de la sèrie televisiva "Law & Order". Dos dels seus fills, Mira Sorvino i Michael Sorvino, són també actors.

保罗·安东尼·索维诺（/sɔːrˈviːnoʊ/，意大利语：[sorˈviːno];1939 年 4 月 13 日 - 2022 年 7 月 25 日）是美国演员、歌剧演唱家、商人、作家和雕塑家。他经常扮演法律双方的权威人物，并因在1990年的黑帮电影《好家伙》中扮演保利·西塞罗（根据保罗·瓦里奥改编）和电视连续剧《法律与秩序》中的纽约警察局警长菲尔·塞雷塔而闻名。他在《A Touch of Class》、《Reds》、《The Rocketeer》、《Nixon》和《Romeo + Juliet》中担任配角。他是演员米拉·索维诺（Mira Sorvino）和迈克尔·索维诺（Michael Sorvino）的父亲。
data.name: 保罗·索维诺

data.biography: 保羅·安東尼·索維諾（/sɔːrˈviːnoʊ/，義大利語：[sorˈviːno]; 1939 年 4 月 13 日 - 2022 年 7 月 25 日）是美國演員、歌劇演唱家、商人、作家和雕塑家。他經常扮演法律雙方的權威人物，並因在 1990 年的黑幫電影《盜亦有道》中扮演保利·西塞羅（根據保羅·瓦里奧改編）和電視聯續劇《法律與秩序》中的紐約警察局警長菲爾·塞雷塔而聞名。他在《A Touch of Class》、《Reds》、《The Rocketeer》、《Nixon》和《Romeo + Juliet》中擔任配角。他是演員米拉·索維諾（Mira Sorvino）和邁克爾·索維諾（Michael Sorvino）的父親。
data.name: 保羅·索維諾

data.biography: Edgar Vivar se formou em medicina na Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México e chegou a trabalhar dois anos como médico. Mas, ao mesmo tempo que fazia medicina, Edgar se interessou pela área artística e começou a fazer teatro, conciliando as duas profissões. No início dos anos 1970, Edgar gravou um comercial de geladeiras. Roberto Gómez Bolaños viu o comercial, gostou e convidou Edgar para participar de seus programas cômicos. Vivar então aceitou o convite e abandonou a medicina para seguir na atuação. Nos programas de Roberto, Vivar conseguiu popularidade com os personagens Senhor Barriga, Nhonho, Botijão e Pança.

Édgar Vivar is a Mexican actor and comedian, born on December 28, 1948, in Mexico City. Although his grandfather had encouraged his artistic side, in which he was very interested, Edgar ended up choosing medicine as an area of ​​study, preparing at the National Autonomous University of Mexico (UNAM). But given that his career required completing credits in the artistic area, Vivar found that the only option with space was theater and remembering his interest in it, generated by his grandfather, he decided that it could be an interesting experience. The taste for theater did not end and, although he finished his medical degree, he entered the University Theater Center, which concluded in 1964. He practiced as a doctor for a year, but left the profession when he received a call from Roberto Gómez Bolaños, to join the television show "El Chavo del 8", where he plays "El Señor Barriga", 'Ñoño" and "Caquito Botija", characters for which Édgar is known and admired worldwide.
data.name: Edgar Vivar

data.biography: 埃德加·维瓦尔（Édgar Vivar）是墨西哥演员和喜剧演员，1948年12月28日出生于墨西哥城。尽管他的祖父鼓励他非常感兴趣的艺术方面，但埃德加最终选择了医学作为研究领域，在墨西哥国立自治大学（UNAM）做准备。但鉴于他的职业生涯需要在艺术领域完成学分，Vivar 发现空间的唯一选择是戏剧，并想起他对它的兴趣，这是他祖父产生的，他决定这可能是一次有趣的经历。对戏剧的品味并没有结束，尽管他完成了医学学位，但他进入了大学戏剧中心，该中心于 1964 年结束。他当了一年的医生，但当他接到罗伯托·戈麦斯·博拉尼奥斯的电话时，他离开了这个行业，加入了电视节目“El Chavo del 8”，在那里他扮演了“El Señor Barriga”、“Ñoño”和“Caquito Botija”，埃德加因此而闻名于世并受到钦佩。
data.name: 埃德加·维瓦尔

data.biography: 埃德加·維瓦爾（Édgar Vivar）是墨西哥演員和喜劇演員，1948 年 12 月 28 日出生於墨西哥城。儘管他的祖父鼓勵他非常感興趣的藝術方面，但埃德加最終選擇了醫學作為研究領域，在墨西哥國立自治大學（UNAM）做準備。但鑑於他的職業生涯需要在藝術領域完成學分，Vivar 發現空間的唯一選擇是戲劇，並想起他對它的興趣，這是他祖父產生的，他決定這可能是一次有趣的經歷。對戲劇的品味並沒有結束，儘管他完成了醫學學位，但他進入了大學戲劇中心，該中心於 1964 年結束。他當了一年的醫生，但當他接到羅伯託·戈麥斯·博拉尼奧斯的電話時，他離開了這個行業，加入了電視節目“El Chavo del 8”，在那裏他扮演了“El Señor Barriga”、“Ñoño”和“Caquito Botija”，埃德加因此而聞名於世並受到欽佩。
data.name: 埃德加·維瓦爾

Tammy Blanchard (born December 14, 1976) is an American actress. She has worked primarily in films and television, making her professional start in the soap opera Guiding Light.

For her first stage appearance, she played the role of Louise/Gypsy in the 2003 Broadway revival of the musical Gypsy: A Musical Fable, for which she earned both a Tony Award nomination and a Theatre World Award. She received the Emmy Award for her portrayal of a teenage Judy Garland in the television movie Life with Judy Garland: Me and My Shadows. She stars as Hedy LaRue in the 2011 Broadway revival of How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying and was nominated for a 2011 Tony Award for Featured Actress in a Musical for the role.

data.biography:
Griffin Dunne est un acteur, producteur, réalisateur et scénariste américain né le 8 juin 1955 à New York.

Griffin Dunne est né à New York. Fils du producteur Dominick Dunne et neveu de l'écrivain John Gregory Dunne, il est le frère de l'actrice Dominique Dunne. Il grandit à Los Angeles et passa une partie de sa scolarité dans le Colorado avant de revenir à New York dans les années 1970.

Actif au théâtre, au cinéma et à la télévision, il accède à la notoriété grâce au film Le Loup-garou de Londres de John Landis et il est également connu pour avoir tenu le rôle principal du film After Hours de Martin Scorsese.

On l’aperçoit ensuite dans Johnny le dangereux avec Michael Keaton, Who's That Girl avec Madonna, dans Le Grand bleu de Luc Besson ou encore dans My Girl avec Macaulay Culkin. Une semaine après le film Who's that girl, il avait mal au dos à cause d'un malaise où il tenait le rôle de Loudon TROTT, et Madonna l'a soigné.

Puis il se lance dans la réalisation ou il dirige Meg Ryan et Matthew Broderick dans Addicted To Love, Nicole Kidman et Sandra Bullock dans Les Ensorceleuses, Diane Lane et Donald Sutherland dans Des gens impitoyables, Uma Thurman et Colin Firth dans Un mari de trop.

Il a été l'époux de 1989 à 1995 de la comédienne Carey Lowell, avec qui il a eu une fille.

Source: Article "Griffin Dunne" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography: Milena Vukotić (born April 23, 1938) is a former ballerina and a stage, television, and film actress. data.biography:
Милена Вукотич - итальянская актриса кино и театра.

Родилась 23 апреля 1938 года в Риме, Италия в семье драматурга-комедиографа и пианистки. Отец Милены Вукотич был выходцем из югославской Черногории, мать - итальянкой.

Училась в балетной школе в Риме, окончила Парижскую консерваторию.

Милена Вукотич дебютировала на киноэкране в 1960 году. Снималась в фильмах выдающихся кинематографистов. Исполнила роль Элизабет в мелодраме Федерико Феллини "Джульетта и духи" (1965); снималась в ряде фильмов испанского режиссера Луиса Бунюэля: "Скромное обаяние буржуазии" (1972),"Призрак свободы" (1974), "Этот смутный объект желания" (1977); сыграла небольшую роль служанки в фильме Андрея Тарковского "Ностальгия" (1983).

Широкую известность Милена Вукотич получила после исполнения роли Пины Фантоцци в серии комедий Паоло Виладжо о бухгалтере Фантоцци (1980-1999). В 1994 году удостоена премии "Серебрянная лента" за исполнение роли жены Фантоцци в комедии "Фантоцци в раю" (1993).

Милена Вукотич с успехом играет в артхаусных лентах: Фрида в картине Жан-Жак Бенекса "Луна в сточной канаве" (1983), мать Маргарет в фильме Нагиси Ошима "Макс, любовь моя" (1986).

Актерские удачи Милены Вукотич - Эсмеральда в фильме ужасов "Кровь для Дракулы" (1974, реж. Прол Моррисси), графиня Луччино в мелодраме Майка Баркера "Хорошая женщина" (2004), Поль во французском телесериале "Одна большая семья" (1992-2007).

米莱娜·武科蒂奇 （Milena Vukotić） 是前芭蕾舞演员，也是舞台、电视和电影女演员。她出生于罗马，父亲是黑山喜剧演员，母亲是意大利钢琴家/作曲家。她因在 Fantozzi 系列喜剧电影中扮演 Pina 的角色而闻名。其他银幕作品包括《阿拉贝拉》、《冒险家》、《德古拉之血》、《自由魅影》、《主教》、《灵魂朱丽叶》和《好女人》。她在法国电视连续剧《Une famille formidable》中反复扮演角色。
data.name: 米莱娜·武科蒂奇

data.biography:
Kirron Kher ilk filmini 1983'te Pencap uzun metrajlı filmi Aasra Pyar Da'da yaptı. Bundan sonra 1996 yılına kadar filmlere ara verdi.  1983 ve 1996 yılları arasında Pestonjee (1987) adlı bir filmde rol aldı. ikinci kocası Anupam Kher'in yanında küçük bir rol oynadı.

Oyunculuğa geri dönüşü, 1990'ların ortalarında, oyun yazarı Javed Siddiqui tarafından yazılan ve Feroz Abbas Khan'ın yönettiği Saalgirah oyunuyla tiyatroya adım attı . Ardından Zee TV'de yayınlanan kısa süreli Purushkshetra ile başlayan ve alternatif cinsellik tartışmasını ilk kez gündeme getirmesiyle dikkat çeken ve aynı zamanda kadın sorunlarına da değinen üç televizyon programına ev sahipliği yaptı .  Geri dönüş filmi Shyam Benegal , Sardari Begum (1996) tarafından yapıldı ve 1997 Ulusal Film Ödülleri'nde Jüri Özel Ödülü'nü kazandı .

En İyi Kadın Oyuncu Ulusal Film Ödülü'nü kazandı, Banglalı bir sinema oyuncusu Rita Koiral'in Kirron karakteri için dublaj yaptığını iddia etmesi üzerine bir tartışma çıktı ve bu da onu ödül için eşit bir iddia sahibi yaptı. Kirron, diyalog sunumu için saatlerce prova yaptığını iddia ederek suçlamaları reddetti ve sonunda ödül paylaşılmadı.  2002'de, Kirron , Shahrukh Khan , Madhuri Dixit ve Aishwarya Rai ile birlikte Devdas'ta (2002) göründü ve Filmfare En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi .

2005 yılında Sahara One kanalında yayınlanan Prratima adlı televizyon dizisinde Sunanda rolünü oynadı ve daha önce Dil Na Jaane Kyon ( Zee TV ), Isi Bahane ve Chausath Panne gibi dizilerde rol aldı .  Çoğunlukla yardımcı roller oynamasına rağmen, başarılı filmleri arasında Main Hoon Na (2004), Hum Tum (2004), Veer-Zaara (2004) ve performansıyla eleştiriler aldığı Mangal Pandey: The Rising (2005) yer alıyor. Onun çalışmaları Rang De Basanti (2006) büyük bir hit oldu ve onun performansı için ona ikinci aday var Filmfare En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu Ödülü kazandırdı .  Fanaa (2006) ve Kabhi Alvida Naa Kehna (2006) da takdir gördü. 2008'deki komik roller listesine ek olarak Singh Is Kingng , Saas bahu aur Sensex veDostana . 2009'da, Got Talent serisinin Hint franchise'ı olan India's Got Talent'te yargıç olarak göründü.

Alexander Nathan Etel is a former English actor. His film debut was the starring role of Damian Cunningham in 2004's Millions, a family film directed by Danny Boyle. He played the lead in his second film, Jay Russell's The Water Horse: Legend of the Deep. The film, based on a Dick King Smith story about a boy who adopts a monster sea creature, opened in North America on Christmas Day, 2007 and in other countries in early 2008. The film is set in Scotland during World War II, although all the scenes involving the creature itself were shot in New Zealand.

Etel also played the bright-eyed ragamuffin Harry Gregson in the six-part TV adaptation of Elizabeth Gaskell's "Cranford" for the BBC and WGBH, which was transmitted on BBC 1 in the autumn of 2007 and co-starred Philip Glenister, Judi Dench, Eileen Atkins, Francesca Annis and Imelda Staunton. He reprised his role in the two-part second series entitled Return to Cranford.

He is currently scheduled to appear in two projects: From Time to Time, an adaptation of The Chimneys of Green Knowe directed by Julian Fellowes, and Easter Sixteen set in Dublin during the Easter Rising of 1916.

data.biography:
Lewis Niles Black (born August 30, 1948) is an American stand-up comedian, author, playwright, social critic and actor. He is known for his comedy style, which often includes simulating a mental breakdown, or an increasingly angry rant, ridiculing history, politics, religion, trends and cultural phenomena. He hosted the Comedy Central series Lewis Black's Root of All Evil, and makes regular appearances on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart delivering his “Back in Black” commentary segment. When not on the road performing, he resides in Manhattan. He also maintains a residence in Chapel Hill, N.C. He is currently the spokesman for Aruba Tourism, appearing in television ads that aired in late 2009 and 2010. He was voted 51st of the 100 greatest stand-up comedians of all time by Comedy Central in 2004.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Lewis Black, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

data.biography: 刘易斯·奈尔斯·布莱克（生于1948年8月30日）是美国单口喜剧演员、作家、剧作家、社会评论家和演员。他以喜剧风格而闻名，其中通常包括模拟精神崩溃或越来越愤怒的咆哮，嘲笑历史、政治、宗教、趋势和文化现象。他主持了喜剧中心系列节目刘易斯·布莱克的万恶之源，并定期出现在《每日秀》中，乔恩·斯图尔特（Jon Stewart）发表了他的“Back in Black”评论片段。当不在路上表演时，他住在曼哈顿。他还在北卡罗来纳州教堂山拥有住所。他目前是阿鲁巴旅游局的发言人，出现在2009年底和2010年播出的电视广告中。2004 年，他被喜剧中心评为有史以来最伟大的 51 位单口喜剧演员中的第 100 位。
data.name: 刘易斯·布莱克

data.biography: 劉易斯·奈爾斯·布萊克（生於 1948 年 8 月 30 日）是美國單口喜劇演員、作家、劇作家、社會評論家和演員。他以喜劇風格而聞名，其中通常包括模擬精神崩潰或越來越憤怒的咆哮，嘲笑歷史、政治、宗教、趨勢和文化現象。他主持了喜劇中心繫列節目劉易·布萊克的萬惡之源，並定期出現在《每日秀》中，喬恩·斯圖爾特（Jon Stewart）發表了他的“Back in Black”評論片段。當不在路上表演時，他住在曼哈頓。他還在北卡羅來納州教堂山擁有住所。他目前是阿魯巴旅遊局的發言人，出現在 2009 年底和 2010 年播出的電視廣告中。2004 年，他被喜劇中心評為有史以來最偉大的 51 位單口喜劇演員中的第 100 位。
data.name: 劉易·布萊克

data.biography:
Льюис Найлс Блэк (родился 30 августа 1948 года) — американский стендап-комик, писатель, драматург, социальный критик и актёр. Он известен своим стилем комедии, который часто включает в себя имитацию психического срыва или всё более гневную тираду, высмеивание истории, политики, религии, тенденций и культурных явлений. Он вёл сериал на Comedy Central «Корень всех зол» Льюиса Блэка и регулярно появляется на The Daily Show с Джоном Стюартом, давая свой сегмент комментариев «Back in Black». Когда он не гастролирует, он живёт в Манхэттене. Он также имеет резиденцию в Чапел-Хилл, Северная Каролина. В настоящее время он является представителем Aruba Tourism, появляясь в телевизионной рекламе, которая транслировалась в конце 2009 и 2010 годах. В 2004 году Comedy Central назвал его 51-м из 100 величайших стендап-комиков всех времен.

Описание выше из статьи Википедии Льюис Блэк, лицензированной по лицензии CC-BY-SA, полный список участников в Википедии.
data.name: Льюис Блэк

data.biography:
Lewis Niles Black (ur. 30 sierpnia 1948) to amerykański komik, autor, dramatopisarz, krytyk społeczny i aktor. Jest znany ze swojego stylu komediowego, który często obejmuje symulowanie załamania nerwowego lub coraz bardziej wściekłego wywodu, wyśmiewanie historii, polityki, religii, trendów i zjawisk kulturowych. Prowadził serię Lewis Black's Root of All Evil w Comedy Central i regularnie pojawia się w The Daily Show z Jonem Stewartem, który wygłasza swój segment komentarza „Back in Black”. Kiedy nie jest w trasie, mieszka na Manhattanie. Posiada również rezydencję w Chapel Hill, N.C. Obecnie jest rzecznikiem Aruba Tourism, występując w reklamach telewizyjnych emitowanych pod koniec 2009 i 2010 roku. W 2004 roku został wybrany 51. na 100 najlepszych komików stand-upowych wszech czasów przez Comedy Central.

Opis powyżej pochodzi z artykułu Wikipedii Lewis Black, licencjonowanego na podstawie CC-BY-SA, pełna lista współpracowników na Wikipedii.

Tommi Henrik Liski (s. 17. kesäkuuta 1971 Jokioinen) on suomalainen näyttelijä ja käsikirjoittaja. Liski tunnetaan rooleistaan televisiosarjoista Kimmo ja Kallio.

Liski palkittiin Vuoden käsikirjoittajan Kultaisella Venlalla 2013 yhdessä Petja Peltomaan kanssa televisiosarjasta Kimmo. Liski on valmistunut Teatterikorkeakoulusta ja on koulutukseltaan teatteritaiteen maisteri.

data.biography: 林文龙，1987年参加超级新星选举，然后加入训练班，1988年在无线电视开始演出戏剧，从低层做起，由跑龙套，配角等戏份开始演出，之后戏份慢慢吃重，1989年第一次在《猎魂》这套单元剧担任重角，1990年在《人在边缘》中的反角令文龙初露锋芒，这套剧不但令观众认识他，更被TVB力捧，之后的剧中都担任主角，后来在爱情剧《都市的童话》中与朱茵的完美搭配更是在香港掀起一阵“龙茵风”，其后作品还有《箭侠恩仇》、《爱在暴风的日子》、《洗冤录》、《锦绣良缘》、《皆大欢喜》中，均有不俗的演出，近期作品是《十兄弟》、《本草药王》、《法证先锋》、《布衣神相》、《法证先锋II》，角色都是男主角居多。2009年1月9日签约北京明和星和演艺经纪有限公司成为旗下艺员，正式进军内地。

data.biography:
Tim Connolly (born December 31, 1969) is an American stunt performer, coordinator, and second-unit director. Standing at six feet one inch with an athletic build, he first gained recognition for his work as a stunt performer on major action blockbusters. Early in his career, he performed stunts in high-adrenaline films such as 300 (2006) and The Matrix Reloaded (2003).

Connolly built a reputation as a reliable stunt double, most notably doubling Gerard Butler in Geostorm, Callan Mulvey in Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice, Liev Schreiber in X‑Men Origins: Wolverine, and Ben Affleck in Daredevil. He also worked on well-known franchises, including Fast & Furious, John Wick, and Jurassic World, showcasing his versatility and commitment to physically demanding roles. Over the years, Connolly amassed more than 100 stunt credits, cementing his place behind the scenes in Hollywood action cinema.

Beyond performing stunts, Connolly has shifted into leadership positions in the industry. He served as fight coordinator on multiple episodes of Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D., including key episodes like “Window of Opportunity” and “Collision Course,” in addition to helming stunt coordination for series such as Runaways and The Old Man, the latter of which he also second-unit directed. His coordination work spans various genres and franchises, including contributions to Venom and Altered Carbon.
data.name: Tim Connolly

Baron Paul Hill (born June 23, 1953) is a retired American politician who served as a U.S. Representative for Indiana's 9th congressional district from 1999 to 2005 and from 2007 to 2011.

A native of Seymour, Indiana, Hill is a Democrat, and as a member of Congress belonged to the conservative-leaning Blue Dog Coalition of that party. Hill's district is in the southeastern part of the state, stretching from Bloomington to the Indiana side of the Louisville metropolitan area.

data.biography:
Martina Gedeck [ˈɡeˑdɛk] (nacida el 14 de septiembre de 1961 en Múnich) es una actriz alemana. Alcanzó fama internacional gracias al papel principal en las películas Bella Martha y Das Leben der Anderen o La vida de los otros. Ha ganado múltiples premios entre los que destacan el Deutscher Filmpreis (Premios del cine alemán) en 1997 y 2002. Figura entre las actrices más importantes del cine y la televisión alemanes.

Martina Gedeck es la mayor de tres hermanas. Su niñez y juventud transcurrió en Baviera. Martina Gedeck se ha referido a la relación con sus padres como armónica y llena de confianza. En su niñez apenas tuvo contacto con los medios. Gedeck: “No teníamos televisión. Sólo en casa de mi abuela podíamos ver ‚Pan Tau‘ und ‚Augsburger Puppenkiste‘. Raras veces nos proponían juegos prefabricados. Mis padres valoraban ante todo la fantasía.”. En 1971 su familia se mudó a Berlín.

Sus primeros años de escuela los pasó Gedeck en la Schadow-Oberschule en Zehlendorf (Berlín) donde en 1981 aprobó la selectividad. Entre 1977 y 1978, estuvo durante un año en Nueva Jersey, Estados Unidos, como estudiante de intercambio. Con motivo de un curso de teatro en el Instituto actuó en una pieza de Turgenev. Después de la selectividad se matriculó en la Universidad Libre de Berlín, en las asignaturas de Historia y Germanística. Entre 1982 y 1986 completó su formación como actriz en el Seminario Max Reinhardt de Berlín. Su primera aparición oficial en un teatro tuvo lugar en 1985 en el Theater am Turm de Francfort como presa de un correccional en la pieza Aschenkinder de Janusz Glowacki. En los años siguientes actuó en más obras como, por ejemplo, en Der Geizige de Molière, y como trabajadora social en Das Stille Kind de Martín Grimp.

Martina Friederike Gedeck ist eine deutsche Schauspielerin.

Ihre Filmkarriere begann 1988 mit Auftritten in zwei Filmen von Dominik Graf (Die Beute und Tiger, Löwe, Panther). Ende der 1980er-Jahre spielte sie unterschiedliche Rollen in Fernsehserien.
data.name: Martina Gedeck

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Red West (born 1936) is an American actor, film stuntman and songwriter.

West was born Robert Gene West in Memphis, Tennessee, the son of Lois and Newton Thomas West. He was a close high school friend of rock and roll singer Elvis Presley. An excellent athlete and former U.S. Marine, West played football for his high school and junior college teams and was a boxer in the Golden Gloves championships.

Today, he is probably best known to American film audiences for his role as Red in Road House, alongside Patrick Swayze.

韦斯特出生于田纳西州孟菲斯的罗伯特·吉恩·韦斯特，是露易丝和牛顿·托马斯·韦斯特的儿子。他是摇滚歌手埃尔维斯·普雷斯利（Elvis Presley）的亲密高中朋友。作为一名优秀的运动员和前美国海军陆战队员，韦斯特为他的高中和初中球队踢足球，并且是金手套锦标赛的拳击手。

今天，他最被美国电影观众所熟知的可能是他在《路屋》中与帕特里克·斯威兹（Patrick Swayze）一起饰演的瑞德。

Adrian Lester est un acteur britannique.

Il passa son enfance en Angleterre. Il est le fils d'immigrants Jamaïcains : Monica, secrétaire médicale, et Reginald, responsable d'une entreprise de nettoyage. Il suit des cours d'art dramatique à l'École Royale d'art dramatique à Londres.

Lester est notamment connu au Royaume-Uni pour son rôle dans la série Les Arnaqueurs VIP. Il a interprété le rôle d'Hamlet dans la mise en scène de Peter Brook en 2000 au théâtre des Bouffes du Nord à Paris.

Il est marié à l'actrice Lolita Chakrabarti. Ils habitent au sud-est de Londres avec leurs deux filles, Lila et Jasmine.

Source : Wikipedia.

Lester出生在英国伯明翰的一个牙买加移民家庭。他10就开始在唱诗班表演，并在Birmingham青年剧院演出，后来还参加了伦敦Royal Academy的戏剧学习。 Lester与女演员Lolita Chakrabarti共结连理，现与两个女儿Lila和Jasmine一起居住在伦敦东南部地区。他在《United Kingdom》演出被观众所熟知，并出演了BBC电视剧《飞天大盗》2004-2006年间的三季，还在电影《风起云涌》、《后天》等中扮演了角色，其中在《风起云涌》中的表演还为他赢得了芝加哥电影评论协会的最有前途演员奖提名。
data.name: 阿德里安·莱斯特
